title: agalinis rigida
intro: Agalinis rigida, also known as stiff green dragon, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Orobanchaceae family and is native to North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of indigestion and nausea. The health benefits of Agalinis rigida include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically dried and used as a tea or tincture, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
